prompt: TRUE chunky pixel art talent emblem ONLY on an exact 32×32 logical pixel grid rendered large; every logical pixel one clean flat square block — uniform square pixel blocks only, no smaller detail, smooth gradient, anti-aliasing, blur, or dithering. A single centered storybook night-garden fantasy emblem in three-quarter display angle: two crossed fletched arrows with mint feather vanes, mint-sage shafts, cream tips, plum nocks. Keep the entire emblem SMALL and well inside the frame with VERY generous empty magenta margin — at least six full magenta cells of clearance on every edge especially top bottom left and right; do not let any arrow tip or feather touch the canvas edge. Flat solid magenta #ff00ff background filling the entire canvas, nothing else in frame. Use only mint / berry / cream / plum Moonberry colours (8–12 flat colours). No brown, tan, cyan, pure white, or pure black. Structural members at least 3 logical pixels thick. No shadow, glow, sparkle, particles, text, watermark, or transparency.
note: #612 Hunter Tier-3 Talent / Ability Talent one-variant icon
